items.name: Golden Roped
items.description: Get yourself a gold plated roped - because you're worth it!

items.name: From the Vault: Alligator Plushie
items.description: From the vault of interns past, ROBLOX brings you - an angry alligator! ZolarKeth's alligator launches into the air and retrieves a basketball from the nether. The alligator then follows the player at a maximum speed of seventeen.

items.name: Holiday Ham
items.description: Best way to stay healthy and strong this holiday season?  Enjoy some of this holiday ham!  Doubles your health!

items.name: Bombastic Katana
items.description: *Bombastic first aid kit not included.

items.name: Paintball Pro
items.description: You are allied with no team.  You shoot for you.

items.name: Ultraviolet Blaster
items.description: Pew! Pew! Neon magenta laser beams are everywhere, but you don't care because you're the one shooting them! This weapon is good for shooting things from a distance. Hit 'Z' to activate the scope and use the mouse to zoom in and get a better view of the target.

items.name: First Aid Kit
items.description: Why aren't they just called aid kits? Or bandaid boxes?  Why the word first?

items.name: Quantum Entangler
items.description: Create a clone of yourself and then choose to control youself or the clone.  Be careful, when clones are created there is a shock to the entire game!

items.name: Spectral Sword of Illusions
items.description: "Rainbows are visions, but only illusions / And Rainbows have nothing to hide"

items.name: Jade Katana of the Darkest Forest
items.description: "The career of a sage is of two kinds: He is either honored by all in the world, Like a flower waving its head, Or else he disappears into the silent forest." - Lao Tzu

items.name: Military Axe
items.description: Axe me no more questions, I'll kill no more your spies.

items.name: Katana of the Golden Snake
items.description: Click to slash dealing 22 damage. When your opponent least expects it, double click to dash at him and strike dealing up to 50 damage!

items.name: Disintergrex Blast Gun
items.description: Veteran space pirates swear by these, though they are hard to find these days. Manufactured specifically to combat robots in the War of the Second Uprising, the Disintergrex uses patented tri-pulse technology. Thus the hugely successful marketing slogan: "If it's still moving, shoot it three times!"

items.name: Overseer Smashing Hammer
items.description: Click to swing this hammer and whack enemies dealing 20 damage per hit.  Double click to bash the hammer against the ground to trip nearby foes. Hit 'Q' to summon half a dozen overseer minions, which will chase after your enemies dealing 10 damage per hit. After 30 seconds, the minions are removed and a 20 second reload kicks in.

items.name: Mahem's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: Mahem. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: Meerkat Horde
items.description: Spawn a horde of 6 attack meerkats which you can command to chase after your foes.

items.name: Protest Sign: Noobs
items.description: In a mob? You're probably surrounded by n00bs.

items.name: Overseer Warlord's Sword
items.description: The mighty can take what they want. This mythical blade flames green and does 17 damage per slash.  Double click to dash attack. The mighty magic of this blade protects you from your foes and reduces damage by 20%.

items.name: Golden Katana of the Unflinching Dawn
items.description: "Victory is reserved for those who are willing to pay it's price." - Sun Tzu

items.name: Chaos Master's Wing Slasher
items.description: Man may not fly in your presence.  Any person with wings will have them slashed by this sword and fall to their peril.  As for your enemies on the ground, they'll have a tough time escaping this swords speedy 24 damage hit.

items.name: Rolling Pin
items.description: Your grandma uses this to make pies.  What will you use it for?

items.name: Spec Beta Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: In 2113, decades after the initial release of the hugely successful Spec Alpha biograft energy weapons, the US government began research on a top-secret upgrade. The breakthrough was to use artificial diamonds to forge the blade itself, rather that carbon nanofibers. The new weapon was very effective, but obscenely expensive. Only a hundred were ever made.

items.name: Fortune Cookie
items.description: Nom nom nom... A mysterious stranger will be the key to my success?  Silly cookie...cookies are for eating...not prophesying...

items.name: Sword of Glowing Hope
items.description: Even in the deepest darkness, there is hope in the flash of my blade. This sword is lit up so it's bright in dark places and slightly glows. Slash at your enemies dealing 17 damage per hit. Upon slashing enemies, sparks emit out of the sword. Anybody killed will burst into neon green flame particles and vanish.

items.name: Helen The Hiphipapotamus
items.description: Meet Helen, the Hiphipapotamus. Helen is the #1 toy in Robloxia and if you want to find her in a toy store, you better be packing heat to deal with all the other crazy parents trying to buy one.

items.name: Overseer Mage Staff
items.description:
The eye that sees the past, present, and future.
Use it to throw terrible flames at your foes.

items.name: simoon68's ROBLOX Tablet
items.description: Winner: simoon68. ROBLOX will be in touch to redeem this prize. Void if sold, traded, or deleted.

items.name: Ghostfire Sword
items.description: This super fast sword will put you miles ahead of your opponents. Combine its speed with the damaging Ghostfire, and you're unstoppable!

items.name: Chiefjustus Gavel
items.description: Dispense justice for all with this oversized justice gavel.  Dispense justice even faster with its secret moves!  Not unlike a ban hammer if I do say so myself...

items.name: Blizzard Striker
items.description: Everywhere you go, the freezing snow follows. Anyone who gets close to you while you are wielding this sword will lose health due to the pain of being near your icy cold weapon.  Click to slash at your enemies, dealing around 15 damage per hit. There is a 20% chance your enemy will freeze into a block of ice for 15 seconds. This disables control over his character, making him unable to move and very vulnerable to your frozen attacks.  Let it go, indeed!
